pokemon:eevee.name: Eevee
pokemon:eevee.summary: Eevee has an unstable genetic makeup that suddenly mutates due to the environment in which it lives. Radiation from various stones causes this Pokémon to evolve.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Eevee has an unstable genetic makeup that suddenly mutates due to the environment in which it lives. Radiation from various stones causes this Pokémon to evolve.
Because its genetic makeup is irregular, it quickly changes its form due to a variety of causes.
Thanks to its unstable genetic makeup, this special Pokémon conceals many different possible evolutions.
Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.
Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.
A rare Pokémon that adapts to harsh environments by taking on different evolutionary forms.
An EEVEE has an unstable genetic makeup that suddenly mutates due to its environment. Radiation from various STONES causes this POKéMON to evolve.
An extremely rare POKéMON that may evolve in a number of different ways depending on stimuli.
It has the ability to alter the com­ position of its body to suit its surrounding envi­ ronment.
It has the ability to alter the composition of its body to suit its surrounding environment.
Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONES.
Harbors the potential to evolve into manifold forms. Within Eevee lies the key to the mysteries of Pokémon evolution—I'm certain of it.
It can evolve into a variety of forms. Eevee’s genes are the key to solving the mysteries of Pokémon evolution.
It can evolve into a variety of forms. Eevee’s genes are the key to solving the mysteries of Pokémon evolution.
Current studies show it can evolve into an incredible eight different species of Pokémon.
Eevee has an unstable genetic makeup that suddenly mutates due to the environment in which it lives. Radiation from various stones causes this Pokémon to evolve.
A rare Pokémon that adapts to harsh environments by taking on different evolutionary forms.
Because its genetic makeup is irregular, it quickly changes its form due to a variety of causes.
Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.
EEVEE has an unstable genetic makeup that suddenly mutates due to the environment in which it lives. Radiation from various STONES causes this POKéMON to evolve.
EEVEE has an unstable genetic makeup that suddenly mutates due to the environment in which it lives. Radiation from various STONES causes this POKéMON to evolve.
Thanks to its unstable genetic makeup, this special Pokémon conceals many different possible evolutions.
Its irregularly configured DNA is affected by its surroundings. It evolves if its en­ vironment changes.
Its irregularly configured DNA is affected by its surroundings. It evolves if its environment changes.
Possessing an unbalanced and unstable genetic makeup, it conceals many possible evolutions.
It has the ability to alter the composition of its body to suit its surrounding environment.
Its genes are easily influenced by its surroundings. Even its face starts to look like that of its Trainer.
The question of why only Eevee has such unstable genes has still not been solved.
Because its genetic makeup is irregular, it quickly changes its form due to a variety of causes.
Thanks to its unstable genetic makeup, this special Pokémon conceals many different possible evolutions.
A rare Pokémon that adapts to harsh environments by taking on different evolutionary forms.
Thanks to its unstable genetic makeup, this special Pokémon conceals many different possible evolutions.
Its genetic code is unstable, so it could evolve in a variety of ways. There are only a few alive.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Eevee has an unstable genetic makeup that suddenly mutates due to the environment in which it lives. Radiation from various stones causes this Pokémon to evolve.

pokemon:vaporeon.name: Vaporeon
pokemon:vaporeon.summary: Vaporeon underwent a spontaneous mutation and grew fins and gills that allow it to live underwater. This Pokémon has the ability to freely control water.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Vaporeon underwent a spontaneous mutation and grew fins and gills that allow it to live underwater. This Pokémon has the ability to freely control water.
Its cell composition is similar to water molecules. As a result, it can melt away into water.
Its cell composition is similar to water molecules. As a result, it can’t be seen when it melts away into water.
Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.
As it uses the fins on the tip of its tail to swim, it blends with the water perfectly.
It has evolved to be suitable for an aquatic life. It can invisibly melt away into water.
VAPOREON underwent a spontaneous mutation and grew fins and gills that allow them to live underwater. They have the ability to freely control water.
Its body’s cellular structure is similar to the molecular composition of water. It can melt invisibly in water.
When VAPOREON's fins begin to vi­ brate, it is a sign that rain will come within a few hours.
When VAPOREON’s fins begin to vibrate, it is a sign that rain will come within a few hours.
Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid’s.
Tests show that its cells closely resemble water molecules, which perhaps explains its ability to conceal its form while submerged. I believe the origins of mermaid folklore lie with this Pokémon.
Its cell structure is similar to water molecules. It melts into the water and becomes invisible.
Its cell structure is similar to water molecules. It melts into the water and becomes invisible.
Blending in with the water and erasing all signs of its presence, it patiently waits for its prey, fish Pokémon.
Vaporeon underwent a spontaneous mutation and grew fins and gills that allow it to live underwater. This Pokémon has the ability to freely control water.
It has evolved to be suitable for an aquatic life. It can invisibly melt away into water.
Its cell composition is similar to water molecules. As a result, it can melt away into water.
Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.
VAPOREON underwent a spontaneous mutation and grew fins and gills that allow it to live underwater. This POKéMON has the ability to freely control water.
VAPOREON underwent a spontaneous mutation and grew fins and gills that allow it to live underwater. This POKéMON has the ability to freely control water.
Its body’s cellular structure is similar to the molecular composition of water. It can melt invisibly in water.
It prefers beauti­ ful shores. With cells similar to water molecules, it could melt in water.
It prefers beautiful shores. With cells similar to water molecules, it could melt in water.
Its cells are composed of units much like water molecules. It lives close to water and is often mistaken for a mermaid.
When Vaporeon’s fins begin to vibrate, it is a sign that rain will come within a few hours.
It detects nearby moisture with its fin. When its fin begins trembling rapidly, that means rain will fall in a few hours.
Clean, clear waters are its usual habitat. When it’s about to be attacked by an invading enemy, it dives into the water to hide.
Its cell composition is similar to water molecules. As a result, it can melt away into water.
Its cell composition is similar to water molecules. As a result, it can’t be seen when it melts away into water.
It prefers beautiful shores. With cells similar to water molecules, it could melt in water.
It has evolved to be suitable for an aquatic life. It can invisibly melt away into water.
Its cell structure is similar to water molecules. It will melt away and become invis­ ible in water.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Vaporeon underwent a spontaneous mutation and grew fins and gills that allow it to live underwater. This Pokémon has the ability to freely control water.
